* {{ill|Tsuge Yamaguchi Shrine (Nara)|ja|都祁山口神社 (奈良市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuge Yamaguchi Shrine (Nara)|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Nara City|Nara City]], [[:en:Nara Prefecture|Nara Prefecture]], in the Tsuge Koyamado area. * {{ill|Tsuge Yamaguchi Shrine (Tenri)|ja|都祁山口神社 (天理市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuge Yamaguchi Shrine (Tenri)|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Tenri|Tenri]], Nara Prefecture, in the Somanouchi area.
{{disambiguation}}
